import json, pandas as pd
books = pd.read_json(var_call_lirkTf75whY6mzi5e2ZrMbMo)
perfect = pd.DataFrame(var_call_xY2gYG8L0ESiW5QF6CcrDD7j)
# filter English and Literature & Fiction
def is_english(details):
    if not isinstance(details,str): return False
    return 'English' in details

def in_lit_fic(c):
    if not isinstance(c,str): return False
    return 'Literature & Fiction' in c
books_filt = books[books['details'].apply(is_english) & books['categories'].apply(in_lit_fic)]
# fuzzy join: map purchaseid_X to bookid_X
perfect['book_id'] = perfect['purchase_id'].str.replace('purchaseid_','bookid_')
merged = perfect.merge(books_filt, on='book_id', how='inner')
result = merged[['book_id','title','categories']].to_dict(orient='records')
out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)
